admin.database.title: Database overview
admin.database.intro: Snapshot of main tables (passwords, session token hashes, and login usernames hidden). Filter visible rows and delete individual entries when the Actions column is available (works, catalog, sessions, etc.).
admin.database.hint.users: Usernames and passwords excluded; user id links rows elsewhere.
admin.database.hint.csv_import: CSV staging payloads truncated in the preview.
admin.database.confirm_delete: Permanently delete this row from the database?
admin.database.delete_error: Could not delete (server or network error).
admin.enrich.title: Batch catalog enrichment
admin.enrich.subtitle: Link works without a catalog entry using AniList (conservative match).
admin.enrich.help: This tool fills in missing catalog links (empty catalog_id): BookStorage queries AniList with the work title, picks a reasonable match, then creates or reuses a catalog row and attaches it to the work. Useful after CSV import or manual entries. If nothing seems to change, read the JSON output: a high "skipped" count usually means AniList returned no confident match.
admin.enrich.note: Throttled (~400 ms between AniList calls). Matching uses several title shapes (including text without parentheses), then word overlap when several results exist; a single AniList hit is still used as a fallback.
admin.enrich.error_maintenance: The server returned HTML (often your maintenance/offline page) instead of API JSON. Common causes without the app crashing: (1) the reverse proxy timed out (504) — the AniList batch can take a long time (many network calls); raise proxy_read_timeout / proxy_send_timeout (e.g. 120–300s) for this host in NPM; (2) a brief 502/503/504 served as static HTML. Check the response HTTP status in the browser Network tab.
admin.enrich.queue: Works still without a catalog link (next up)
admin.enrich.queue_live: Synced with the database: only works with empty catalog_id. Refreshes after each batch step or when you link/unlink.
admin.enrich.batch_no_pending: No works without catalog left to process for this batch.
admin.enrich.reason.no_results: No AniList results for this title.
admin.enrich.reason.no_confident_match: Several possible titles; automatic match refused.
admin.enrich.confirm.unlink: Remove catalog link (clear catalog_id) for this work?
admin.enrich.works_all.title: All works
admin.enrich.works_all.hint: Up to 500 rows per load; search runs on the database (title).

monitoring.subtitle: Prometheus metrics and observability integration.
monitoring.prometheus.title: Prometheus
monitoring.prometheus.intro: Time series are exposed in Prometheus text format from the BookStorage process. Point a Prometheus server at it (for example the bookstorage-prometheus systemd service after install with INSTALL_WITH_PROMETHEUS=1) or any compatible scraper.
monitoring.prometheus.url_label: Scrape URL (localhost, same port as the app)
monitoring.prometheus.token_on: BOOKSTORAGE_METRICS_TOKEN is set: configure your Prometheus scrape job with bearer_token or credentials (Authorization: Bearer …, or documented token= fallback).
monitoring.prometheus.token_off: No token: only loopback clients (127.0.0.1 / ::1) may read /metrics. To scrape from another host, set BOOKSTORAGE_METRICS_TOKEN in .env and restart the service.
monitoring.prometheus.charts: For dashboards, connect Grafana to Prometheus, for example the local UI:
monitoring.prometheus.live_intro: Instant metrics from the Prometheus HTTP API on this host (auto-refresh every 12s).
monitoring.prometheus.unreachable: Prometheus is not responding on this server.
monitoring.prometheus.url_invalid: BOOKSTORAGE_PROMETHEUS_QUERY_URL must be http(s) to 127.0.0.1, localhost, or ::1 only.
